internal_issues.description: OTS boilerplate across WIN-035/036/037/038/039 said status_history.json 'bundles prediction parameters together with observation results' — imprecise. Audit confirmed file bundles both prediction-side (formula, predicted, tolerance, source) and observation-side (observed, error_pct, pass) fields per domain per commit. Cross-page inconsistency with Timestamp Error tab which said 'observations only'. EXP-290 harmonized both sides.

WIN-002.c4 hole: 'NCAR/Sondrestrom' listed as Schumann observatory but Sondrestrom is primarily known as incoherent-scatter radar / ionospheric studies, not ELF. Curmudgeon recommended replacing with Tomsk Space Observation System or Lehta (Karelia). Recommended_action: no_change (e.g. framing makes list non-exhaustive, defense surface narrow). Noting for future polish only.
